human-review.evidence: Delegated autonomous drive. Reviewed: 14-REQ spec (revised twice — pre-gate + review loopback), the cross-repo discovery that drove Orky v0.28.0 feedback submit, F7 emit->submit amendment with 7 CONV-019 supersessions, runner never-reject hardening, 5-lens review (16 findings, 2 contract blockers) all resolved + 1 fix-regression (FINDING-024) caught and fixed, 24-finding ledger, CONV-032..035. Open residuals inherited: FINDING-022→F10, 010→golden-fixture, 016 deferred (20 Modal consumers), 023 repo-hygiene. Suite 1309 green.

escalations.reason: Review fan-out: 16 findings, 2 blocking contract violations — FINDING-020 (spec's 'only six supersessions' now false after the sanctioned seventh prose repair) and FINDING-009 (spawn failures mapped to a false indeterminate cli-timeout claim). Spec-origin MEDIUMs: 012 accidental-Enter silent journey, 013 close-while-in-flight outcome dropped, 018 StrictMode acceptance mechanism unrunnable, 022 REQ-004 acceptance clauses untestable until F10. Human decision on the loopback.
escalations.decision: Loop back to spec (delegated). Spec amendments: REQ-011 enumerates SEVEN supersessions + repo-wide grep scope per CONV-023 (020); pin spawn-failure→definite cli-error vs timeout-only-for-timeout incl. the runner distinction, and invoke-rejection→indeterminate copy (009/019); REQ-002 gains a visible 'Enter captures · Esc cancels' hint while keeping Enter-in-title (012); REQ-009 pins close-while-in-flight = detached completion with the outcome routed to the toast chokepoint (failures never suppressed) + draft loss on explicit close accepted (013); REQ-006/012 acceptance mechanism corrected — the structural no-effect-dispatch pin IS the StrictMode guard (018); REQ-004 acceptance honestly scoped to the slice seam now + the four render clauses explicitly inherited by F10's e2e (022); clear-failure-on-draft-edit/root-change pinned (008); projectRoot through rejectFlagLike (011); the CommandPalette useMemo reshape documented in-code + anchored-locator CONV recorded (021); per-errorKind render vectors via the e2e stub modes (014). Residuals to ride documented: 010 (cross-repo noop-shape coupling — candidate for the golden-fixture suite), 016 (focus containment — CONV proposal, defer unless cheap at the Modal seam), 017 (overflow containment — fix if trivial), 023 (NUL file — separate repo-hygiene commit outside F12).
